response.global_analysis: Audio features a performance of 'World is Mine' by ryo (supercell) followed by the beginning of 'Koi wa Illusion' by Suzuko Mimori. The video begins with the conclusion of the previous song 'Koe'. Lyrics for 'World is Mine' were verified against common transcriptions and the on-screen title card. Timing is strictly synchronized with the vocal performance, including the spoken cues and shouts. The segment of 'Koi wa Illusion' is subtitled until the video's end, discarding any lyrics beyond that point.

subtitles.original: そう　ずっと　熱い　鼓動へ
subtitles.english: Yes, forever, towards the hot heartbeat...

subtitles.original: いっくよー！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: その一　いつもと違う髪形に気がつくこと
subtitles.english: Number one: Notice when I have a different hairstyle.

subtitles.original: その二　ちゃんと靴まで見ること　いいな？
subtitles.english: Number two: Look properly down to my shoes, okay?

subtitles.original: その三　私の一言には三つの言葉で返事すること
subtitles.english: Number three: Reply to my every word with three words.

subtitles.original: わかったら右手がお留守なのをなんとかして！
subtitles.english: If you understand, do something about my empty right hand!

subtitles.original: 別にわがままなんて言ってないんだから
subtitles.english: It's not like I'm being selfish or anything,

subtitles.original: キミに心から思って欲しいの　かわいいって
subtitles.english: I just want you to think I'm cute from your heart.

subtitles.original: 世界で一番おひめさま
subtitles.english: The number one princess in the world,

subtitles.original: 気がついて　ねえねえ
subtitles.english: Notice me, hey, hey.

subtitles.original: 待たせるなんて論外よ
subtitles.english: Keeping me waiting is out of the question.

subtitles.original: 私を誰だと思ってるの？
subtitles.english: Who do you think I am?

subtitles.original: もう何だか　甘いものが食べたい！
subtitles.english: I feel like... I want to eat something sweet!

subtitles.original: 今すぐに　よ
subtitles.english: Right now.

subtitles.original: Check one two!
subtitles.english: Check one two!

subtitles.original: 欠点？かわいいの間違いでしょ
subtitles.english: Flaws? You must mean 'cute' instead.

subtitles.original: 文句は許しませんの
subtitles.english: I won't allow any complaints.

subtitles.original: あのね、私の話ちゃんと聞いてる？ちょっと...
subtitles.english: Hey, are you listening to what I'm saying? Hey...

subtitles.original: あ、それとね　白いお馬さん　決まってるでしょ？
subtitles.english: Oh, and another thing: a white horse, it's a given, right?

subtitles.original: 迎えに来て
subtitles.english: Come and pick me up.

subtitles.original: わかったら　かしずいて手を取って「おひめさま」って
subtitles.english: If you understand, kneel, take my hand, and call me 'Princess'.

subtitles.original: 別にわがままなんて言ってないんだから
subtitles.english: It's not like I'm being selfish or anything,

subtitles.original: でもね　少しくらい叱ってくれたっていいのよ？
subtitles.english: But you know, it's okay if you scold me just a little bit?

subtitles.original: 世界で私だけのおうじさま
subtitles.english: The only prince in the world for me,

subtitles.original: 気がついて　ほらほら
subtitles.english: Notice me, look, look.

subtitles.original: おててが空いてます
subtitles.english: My hand is empty.

subtitles.original: 無口で無愛想なおうじさま
subtitles.english: My quiet and blunt prince,

subtitles.original: もう　どうして！
subtitles.english: Jeez, why?!

subtitles.original: 気がついてよ早く
subtitles.english: Notice me already!

subtitles.original: ぜったいキミはわかってない！
subtitles.english: You definitely don't get it!

subtitles.original: わかってない...
subtitles.english: You don't get it...

subtitles.original: いちごの乗ったショートケーキ
subtitles.english: Shortcake with strawberries on top,

subtitles.original: こだわり卵の　とろけるプリン
subtitles.english: Melting pudding made with special eggs...

subtitles.original: みんな　みんな　我慢します...
subtitles.english: I'll endure it all, all of it...

subtitles.original: わがままな子だと思わないで
subtitles.english: Don't think of me as a selfish girl,

subtitles.original: 私だってやればできるもん
subtitles.english: I can do it if I try,

subtitles.original: あとで後悔するわよ
subtitles.english: You'll regret it later.

subtitles.original: 当然です！だって私は
subtitles.english: Of course! Because I am...

subtitles.original: 世界で一番おひめさま
subtitles.english: The number one princess in the world,

subtitles.original: ちゃんと見ててよね
subtitles.english: Keep your eyes on me,

subtitles.original: どこかに行っちゃうよ？
subtitles.english: Or I'll go somewhere else, okay?

subtitles.original: ふいに抱きしめられた
subtitles.english: Suddenly, you hugged me.

subtitles.original: 急に　そんな　えっ？
subtitles.english: All of a sudden... like that... what?

subtitles.original: 「轢かれる、危ないよ」
subtitles.english: "You'll get run over, it's dangerous,"

subtitles.original: そう言ってそっぽ向くキミ
subtitles.english: You said, looking away.

subtitles.original: ...こっちのが危ないわよ
subtitles.english: ...this is more dangerous.

subtitles.original: 街の明かりが滲んでる
subtitles.english: The city lights are blurring,

subtitles.original: そっと　手で　触れそうな三日月
subtitles.english: The crescent moon that seems touchable softly by hand.

subtitles.original: あなたに会える...
subtitles.english: I can meet you...
